title: Test Turncoat: 110-E01 SWAP_PRIMARY_CREATURES

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Switch primary creatures with your opponent. Equipped cards are destroyed.

plan.title: Test Turncoat: 110-E01 SWAP_PRIMARY_CREATURES
plan.summary: Create a deterministic dev scenario for Turncoat and verify that 110-E01 SWAP_PRIMARY_CREATURES resolves according to the parsed effect and WARD rules. Assertions were tightened from the printed card text for headless QA.

notes: Rules text: switch primary creatures with your opponent, and equipped cards are destroyed.
Both players start with a primary creature so the swap can be verified.

steps: Verify both players now control the opposite primary creature.
manualVerification: Confirm primary creature ownership/control state is consistent after the swap.
riskNotes: Fallback plan cannot infer every WARD edge case.
The engine remains source of truth; the LLM/fallback only proposes a QA plan.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run the generated scenario and update after reviewing result.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
